Petition By Trustee C. Cole For Approval Of Settlement, For Order Approving Settlement Agreement; For Order Accepting Resignation Of Trustee; For Order Appointing Successor Trustee And For Order For Payment Of Fees To C. Cole.
Off Calendar Jan-18-2012 Continued To Feb-22-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition Of Beneficiaries Adam Degregorie And Braden Levine To Remove Trustee, To Appoint Successor
Off Calendar Nov-23-2011 Continued To Jan-18-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Timothy Chambers for Adam DeGregorio and for Braden Levine. John Hurabiell for Chris Coel (Trustee).

The Parties still disagree on some issues with regard to the settlement agreement. The Court directed Counsel to go outside and discuss how they plan to proceed. Upon returning to the Courtroom, Counsel stated that they still can not agree. The Petition of Beneficiaries to Remove Trustee, etc. was continued to January 18, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to see if there is a petition to approve the settlement. If said petition is filed, it is to be set for January 18, 2011 as well.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.

Petition Of Beneficiaries Adam Degregorie And Braden Levine To Remove Trustee, To Appoint Successor
Off Calendar Nov-09-2011 Continued To Nov-23-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition Of Beneficiaries Adam Degregorie And Braden Levine To Remove Trustee, To Appoint Successor
Off Calendar Oct-25-2011 Continued To Nov-09-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition Of Beneficiaries Adam Degregorie And Braden Levine To Remove Trustee, To Appoint Successor
Off Calendar Aug-30-2011 Continued To Oct-25-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition Of Beneficiaries Adam Degregorie And Braden Levine To Remove Trustee, To Appoint Successor
Off Calendar Jun-21-2011 Continued To Aug-30-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Hurabiell for Chris Cole (Trustee). Timothy Chambers for Adam De Gregorio.

The Parties did not agree to Ms. Dolch being appointed as Trustee of the two Trusts (Alan's/Alice's), to the removal of Mr. Cole or to Mr. Cole's fees. The Court stated that it preferred to have Alan's trust under a seperate trust case number, that the petition to remove Trustee would need to be set for an evidentiary hearing and suggested continuing the matter to see how things proceed as to the sale of the property. Discussions were also held with regard to setting aside/holding the fee amount in escrow so that the property could be sold and the fee issue could be addressed at a later date. The matter was continued to August 30, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition Of Beneficiaries Adam Degregorie And Braden Levine To Remove Trustee, To Appoint Successor
Off Calendar Jun-01-2011 Continued To Jun-21-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
